title: Iroasted I Ethiopian Linguine Dulet
description: A high-protein-friendly brunch dish featuring roasted linguine pasta with a pickle topping.
instructions: Bring a pot of water to boil for pasta.
Cook linguine according to package instructions until al dente, then drain and set aside.
Sauté garlic cloves in a pan with olive oil until golden brown, about 3 minutes.
Add red onion into the pan and sauté for another minute.
Toss cooked linguine into the pan with onions and garlic.
Serve hot topped with pickled cucumbers (Turmeric Pickle).
Optional: Add a drizzle of lemon juice or tahini sauce for extra flavor.
